title: Financial Health Quiz - How Healthy Are Your Finances? | CrunchMilk
metaDescription: Take this free 8-question financial health quiz to get your personalized score. Assess your savings, debt, retirement readiness, and overall money management.
tagline: How healthy are your finances really?

questions.question: How many months of living expenses do you have saved in an emergency fund?

options.text: Less than 1 month
1-3 months
3-6 months
More than 6 months

questions.question: What percentage of your monthly income goes toward debt payments (excluding mortgage)?

options.text: More than 30%
Less than 5% or no debt

questions.question: How much of your income are you saving or investing each month?

options.text: Nothing - I live paycheck to paycheck
Less than 10%
More than 20%

questions.question: Do you have retirement accounts (401k, IRA, etc.) and are you contributing regularly?

options.text: No retirement accounts at all
I have accounts but don't contribute regularly
I contribute but don't max out
I max out my retirement contributions

questions.question: How would you describe your insurance coverage (health, auto, renter's/homeowner's)?

options.text: I'm uninsured or significantly underinsured
I have basic coverage but with high deductibles
I have decent coverage for most areas
I'm fully covered with appropriate policies

questions.question: Do you follow a monthly budget or spending plan?

options.text: No, I have no idea where my money goes
I have a rough idea but don't track closely
I track spending but don't always stick to it
Yes, I budget consistently and review monthly

questions.question: What is your credit score range?

options.text: Below 600 or I don't know
750 or above

questions.question: Do you have a will, estate plan, or beneficiaries designated on your accounts?

options.text: No, nothing is set up
I have beneficiaries on some accounts
I have a basic will but no full plan
Yes, I have a complete estate plan

scoreRanges.label: Needs Attention
scoreRanges.analysis: Your finances need some serious attention. Start by building a small emergency fund and creating a basic budget. Small, consistent steps will make a big difference over time.

scoreRanges.label: Building Foundation
scoreRanges.analysis: You've got some basics in place but there are gaps to fill. Focus on increasing your savings rate and tackling high-interest debt. You're on the right path.

scoreRanges.label: Getting Strong
scoreRanges.analysis: You're doing well in most areas. Fine-tune your strategy by optimizing retirement contributions and making sure your insurance coverage matches your needs.

scoreRanges.label: Excellent Shape
scoreRanges.analysis: Your finances are in great shape. You've built strong habits across savings, investing, and protection. Keep optimizing and consider working with a financial advisor for advanced strategies.
